reflect.name: reflect
reflect.summary: Run packet reflection mode for remote testing
reflect.description: Starts the packet reflector to bounce test packets back to their source.

test.name: test
test.description: Execute RFC 2544, Y.1564, Y.1731, and other network tests.

web.name: web
web.summary: Start the Test Master web interface
web.description: Launches the graphical web interface for test configuration and monitoring.

license.name: license
license.description: Activate, deactivate, or check license status.

version.name: version
version.description: Shows version, build info, and license status.

help.name: help
help.summary: Get help on commands, tests, and concepts
help.description: Displays detailed documentation for any topic.

glossary.name: glossary
glossary.description: Look up network testing terms and concepts.

interface.name: Network interface
interface.description: Network interface for packet transmission (e.g., eth0)

duration.name: Test duration
duration.description: How long to run the test (in seconds)

rfc2544.name: Benchmarking Methodology for Network Interconnect Devices
rfc2544.description: Standard tests for measuring network device performance.

y1564.name: Ethernet Service Activation Test
y1564.description: Service turn-up testing for carrier ethernet.

y1731.name: Ethernet OAM
y1731.description: Operations, Administration, and Maintenance for ethernet services.

rfc2889.name: Benchmarking Methodology for LAN Switching Devices

rfc6349.name: Framework for TCP Throughput Testing
rfc6349.description: TCP performance testing considering protocol behavior.

trafficgen.name: Custom Traffic Generation
trafficgen.description: Generate custom traffic patterns for specialized testing.

throughput.name: Throughput Test
throughput.description: Finds the maximum speed without packet loss

latency.name: Latency Test
latency.description: Measures packet delay through the network

frameLoss.name: Frame Loss Test
frameLoss.description: Measures packet loss at various rates

customStream.name: Custom Traffic Stream
customStream.description: Generate custom traffic patterns for specialized testing
